canonical-rules (Phase 0).note: Rules-first gate complete. 3 parallel contradiction-hunt agents + canonical-doc-coherence (4/4 PASS) reviewed the corpus; the 2 genuine wording ambiguities were settled with the operator and fixed (R1-R5 in CLAUDE-RULES-CANONICAL). Commit c347a4b.

canonical-doc drift (ARCH).note: ARCHITECTURE-CANONICAL reconciled with config/code reality: '12 strategies'->48, squeeze_breakout_4h live, turtle_soup/ict_scalp_5m shadow, alpaca_live real-money live, retired 'IBKR offline' + _DRY_RUN_OVERRIDES 'never landed' claims. Commit 941b8b4.

canonical-doc drift (ROADMAP).note: D7/D8/M16 ROADMAP corrections identified in the findings doc; handed to the follow-on session (S-AUDIT-A remainder), not yet committed.

zombie / dead infrastructure.note: Dead label blocks (stop-micro-zombie, cf-worker-deploy) removed from bootstrap-labels.yml; oci-storage-verify.yml VM_HOST repointed off the terminated micro 158.178.210.252 to 141.145.193.91. Commit 80ccc0f.

live trader / web-api / DB.note: Verified healthy via the diag relay: ict-trader-live + ict-web-api active, heartbeat fresh, trade_journal.db intact (single canonical inode). No zombie units on the live VM.

trainer VM (OOM incident).note: SSH-dead trainer (158.178.209.121) recovered via OCI hard reset -> RUNNING; memory freed (368Mi, swap 0); operator confirmed the green [OK] recovery ping. Structural cure queued as MB-20260709-TRAINER-SUBPROC-ISOLATION.

money-path structural risks.note: RISK-1 (reconciler false-close / closed-flat integrity), RISK-2 (IB warm-up wedge on restart), E1-F1 (order-path bypass) root-caused into verified structural-fix specs (commits 4461fdf, 3389c23) — but the Tier-3 fixes are NOT yet shipped/merged. In flight in the follow-on session; E1-F1 + RISK-1/2 require operator approval before merge.

consumer repos (dashboard / android).note: S-AUDIT-C (5 consumer wiring cosmetics) not yet worked; handed to the follow-on session. No correctness defect confirmed this session — the consumers are rename-resilient by contract.

per-line code sweep (src/).note: S-AUDIT-E per-line sweep is partial. Money-path files audited to structural-fix depth; the exhaustive per-line pass across all of src/ is incomplete and handed off. Honest coverage: partial.

review backlogs.note: ~143 open items across the three review backlogs. Draining to structural resolution (S-AUDIT-G) is handed to the follow-on session; this session did not work them down.

consolidated.headline: Full-system audit — Phase 0 (rules) + kickoff pass. This is the INTERIM audit report: the rules-first gate is settled, canonical-doc drift is corrected (ARCH) or specced (ROADMAP), zombie infra is cleaned up, the live trader/web-api/DB verified healthy, and the OOM-dead trainer recovered (operator-confirmed). The money-path structural risks (RISK-1/2, E1-F1) are root-caused into verified fix specs but NOT yet shipped — they + the S-AUDIT-C/E/G/H workstreams are in flight in the follow-on session. A final closing audit report will publish once the fixes are shipped + live-verified.

operator_priorities.title: Approve the Tier-3 money-path fixes (E1-F1, RISK-1, RISK-2) once their draft PRs land
operator_priorities.detail: E1-F1 order-path bypass, RISK-1 reconciler false-close, RISK-2 IB warm-up wedge are specced + verified but require explicit operator approval before merge (live order path / live-VM). Draft PRs come from the follow-on session.

operator_priorities.title: PR #6016 stays a draft — do not merge without approval
operator_priorities.detail: The program's tracking PR carries governance + rule-doc changes and rides on the audit branch. Merge only on explicit operator go-ahead.

operator_priorities.title: Ship the remaining structural fixes + drain the backlogs (follow-on session)
operator_priorities.detail: RISK-3 (web-api blocking-DB + prop idempotency), RISK-4 (OCI /dev/null deploy clobber), MB-20260709-TRAINER-SUBPROC-ISOLATION, S-AUDIT-C/E/G/H. Tracked in docs/audits/full-system-audit-2026-07-09.md.

cross_review_notes: Verified NON-issues (premise-verification, commit 3389c23): the json.dumps(...)[:N] 'closed-flat' footgun is ALREADY migrated out of src/ (zero matches on main); the _DRY_RUN_OVERRIDES dead-code 'deletion never landed' doc claim is false — it IS deleted. Specs were corrected against main before any code was written.

Coverage honesty: this session covered Phase 0 (rules) fully, ARCH doc-drift fully, zombie-infra fully, VM/DB health via relay, and money-path risk root-causing. It did NOT complete the per-line src/ sweep, the consumer-repo cosmetics, the backlog drain, or ship the Tier-3 fixes — all explicitly handed to the follow-on session and listed under Monitoring.
The running record is docs/audits/full-system-audit-2026-07-09.md (the shared findings brain); this report is the log-facing summary of it.

RISK-1 Task 1 — reconciler false-close hardening (close-on-disappear integrity). Draft PR for operator approval (live-VM reconciler).
RISK-2 — IB account warm-up wedge on restart. Draft PR for operator approval (live order-path connect path).

claude_channel_ping.message: [audit:2026-07-09] roll-up caution — Phase 0 rules settled, ARCH drift fixed, zombie infra cleaned, trainer recovered; money-path fixes (RISK-1/2, E1-F1) specced + in flight, closing report to follow.
